name: Fried Herrings and Onion Sauce (Stegt Sild Med Logsauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and bone the herrings.
2. Dip each herring in a mixture of 2 tablespoons flour, beaten eggs, and bread crumbs.
3. Fry the herring fillets in plenty of butter until golden brown.
4. Serve with onion sauce and boiled potatoes.
5. To make the onion sauce:
a. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a pot over low heat.
b. Stir in 2 tablespoons flour and cook for a few seconds.
c. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
d. Cook until the mixture thickens.
e. Add the finely chopped onions and bring the sauce to a boil.
f. Season with salt and sugar to taste.
6. If desired, you can briefly boil the onions in a little water before adding them to the sauce.
